name: indeed
description: Job search, job details, salary data, company profiles, reviews, and autocomplete via Indeed page-based extraction

dependencies.searchJobs → getJobDetail: searchJobs returns jobkey used by getJobDetail
dependencies.getCompanyOverview → getCompanyReviews: getCompanyOverview shows company slug used by getCompanyReviews
dependencies.getCompanyOverview → getCompanySalaries: getCompanyOverview shows company slug used by getCompanySalaries
dependencies.getCompanyReviews → getReviewFilters: same company slug, getReviewFilters provides filter options for reviews
dependencies.autocompleteJobTitle → getSalary: autocompleteJobTitle returns normalized job titles used by getSalary
dependencies.autocompleteLocation → searchJobs: autocompleteLocation returns location strings used by searchJobs
